qa_pairs.question: How do you manage access to a shared Globus collection after it has been created?
qa_pairs.answer: Once a shared collection is created, you will see the current access list, initially containing only your account. To add people or groups to share with, click on the "Add Permissions -- Share With" button.

qa_pairs.question: What is the function of the "Add Permissions -- Share With" button when managing a shared Globus collection?
qa_pairs.answer: The "Add Permissions -- Share With" button is used to add individuals or groups to the access list of a shared collection, allowing them to access the shared files, as a newly created collection initially only includes your own account.
